item.name: DG Auto Check(XSDG) & CargoIQ Integration Flow
Step1. Create Waybill LO with DG Shipment
Step2. Submit XSDG Auto Acceptance Check

urlencoded.description: Your credential key, as provided on the Web Service Management page
Your secret, as provided when creating Access Credentials on the Web Service Management page
A unique identifier that is fixed for the lifetime of that office. Case sensitive.
Optional: Name to be associated with the officeIdentifier. If not provided, the office name will not be set.
Optional: An identifier unique to the user that will be accountable for all actions while processing acceptance checks. If provided, a one time use URL will be generated.
Optional: Name to be associated with the userIdentifier. If not provided, the user's name will not be set.

request.description:
Register an acceptance check with DG AutoCheck. The only required parameter is officeIdentifier. Everything thereafter is optional.

When a userIdentifier is provided in the querystring, a one time use URL is created for the user to access the acceptance check. Users are created automatically if no user exists with that identifier already. Users are automatically assigned to the office of the acceptance check.

## Permissions

Manage permissions required

API Integrator license type required.

<rsm:ShippersDeclarationForDangerousGoods xmlns:rsm="iata:shippersdeclarationfordangerousgoods:1" xmlns:ccts="urn:un:unece:uncefact:documentation:standard:CoreComponentsTechnicalSpecification:2" xmlns:udt="urn:un:unece:uncefact:data:standard:UnqualifiedDataType:8" xmlns:ram="iata:datamodel:3">

    <rsm:BusinessHeaderDocument>

        <ram:SignatoryConsignorAuthentication>

I declare that all of the applicable air transport requirements have been met.</ram:Statement>
            <ram:Signatory />

                <ram:Name />
            </ram:IssueAuthenticationLocation>
            <ram:ProviderConsignorAuthenticationParty>

    </rsm:BusinessHeaderDocument>
    <rsm:MasterConsignment>
        <ram:IncludedHouseConsignment>
            <ram:ConsignorParty>
                <ram:PrimaryID />

                <ram:PostalStructuredAddress>
                    <ram:PostcodeCode />
                    <ram:StreetName />
                    <ram:CityName />
                    <ram:CountryID />

                    <ram:CountrySubDivisionName />
                    <ram:PostOfficeBox />

                    <ram:PersonName />
                    <ram:DepartmentName />
                    <ram:DirectTelephoneCommunication>
                        <ram:CompleteNumber />
                    </ram:DirectTelephoneCommunication>
                </ram:DefinedTradeContact>
            </ram:ConsignorParty>
            <ram:ConsigneeParty>
                <ram:PrimaryID />
                <ram:AdditionalID />
                <ram:Name>Wild Market 100, Rene-Levesque Blvd. West, H2Z 1V5 Montreal Quebec Montreal Quebec</ram:Name>
                <ram:PostalStructuredAddress>
                    <ram:PostcodeCode />
                    <ram:StreetName />
                    <ram:CityName />
                    <ram:CountryID />
                    <ram:CountryName />
                    <ram:CountrySubDivisionName />
                    <ram:PostOfficeBox />
                </ram:PostalStructuredAddress>
                <ram:DefinedTradeContact>
                    <ram:PersonName />
                    <ram:DepartmentName />
                    <ram:DirectTelephoneCommunication>
                        <ram:CompleteNumber />
                    </ram:DirectTelephoneCommunication>
                </ram:DefinedTradeContact>
            </ram:ConsigneeParty>
            <ram:HandlingInstructions>
                <ram:Description>Health Department\n24 hour number: +34 (981) 34 23 99</ram:Description>
                <ram:ExclusiveUsageIndicator>false</ram:ExclusiveUsageIndicator>
            </ram:HandlingInstructions>
            <ram:AssociatedReferenceDocument>
                <ram:ID>784-43020261</ram:ID>
                <ram:TypeCode>741</ram:TypeCode>
                <ram:Name>Master air waybill</ram:Name>
            </ram:AssociatedReferenceDocument>
            <ram:RelatedCommercialTradeTransaction>
                <ram:IncludedCommercialTradeLineItem>
                    <ram:SequenceNumeric>1</ram:SequenceNumeric>
                    <ram:SpecifiedProductTradeDelivery>
                        <ram:SpecifiedProductRegulatedGoods>
                            <ram:ApplicableProductDangerousGoods>
                                <ram:UNDGIdentificationCode>UN2339</ram:UNDGIdentificationCode>
                                <ram:PackagingDangerLevelCode>II</ram:PackagingDangerLevelCode>
                                <ram:PackingInstructionTypeCode>305</ram:PackingInstructionTypeCode>
                                <ram:HazardClassificationID>3</ram:HazardClassificationID>
                                <ram:ProperShippingName>2-Bromobutane</ram:ProperShippingName>
                                <ram:HazardCategoryCode>3L</ram:HazardCategoryCode>
                            </ram:ApplicableProductDangerousGoods>
                        </ram:SpecifiedProductRegulatedGoods>
                    </ram:SpecifiedProductTradeDelivery>
                </ram:IncludedCommercialTradeLineItem>
                <ram:SpecifiedLogisticsPackage>
                    <ram:ItemQuantity>0</ram:ItemQuantity>
                    <ram:SequenceNumeric>1</ram:SequenceNumeric>
                    <ram:AllPackedInOneIndicator>false</ram:AllPackedInOneIndicator>
                    <ram:UsedSupplyChainPackaging>
                        <ram:Type> </ram:Type>
                    </ram:UsedSupplyChainPackaging>
                    <ram:IncludedPackagedTradeLineItem>
                        <ram:SequenceNumeric>1</ram:SequenceNumeric>
                    </ram:IncludedPackagedTradeLineItem>
                </ram:SpecifiedLogisticsPackage>
            </ram:RelatedCommercialTradeTransaction>
            <ram:ApplicableTransportDangerousGoods>
                <ram:HazardTypeCode>NON-RADIOACTIVE</ram:HazardTypeCode>
                <ram:AircraftLimitationInformation />
                <ram:ComplianceDeclarationInformation>Failure to comply in all respects with the applicable Dangerous Goods Regulations may be in breach of the applicable law, subject to legal penalties</ram:ComplianceDeclarationInformation>
                <ram:ShipperDeclarationInformation>I hereby declare that the contents of this consignment are fully and accurately described above by the proper shipping name, and are classified, packaged, marked and labelled/placarded, and are in all respects in proper condition for transport according to applicable international and national governmental regulations. I declare that all of the applicable air transport requirements have been met.</ram:ShipperDeclarationInformation>
            </ram:ApplicableTransportDangerousGoods>
        </ram:IncludedHouseConsignment>
    </rsm:MasterConsignment>
</rsm:ShippersDeclarationForDangerousGoods>

request.description:
Import XSDG XML as the body of the request to the stated acceptance check.

XSDGs will be validated upon upload, if it does not meet the XSDG requirements a list of errors will be returned.

## Permissions

Manage permissions required

API Integrator license type required.

item.name: Step3. Get XSDG Auto Status 3.> PASS

urlencoded.description: An identifier unique to the user that will be accountable for all actions while processing acceptance checks. If provided, a one time use URL will be generated.
Optional: Name to be associated with the userIdentifier. If not provided, the user's name will not be set.

request.description:
Create a new one time usage URL to access the relevant acceptance check.

URLs expire after 10 minutes.

## Permissions

Manage permissions required

API Integrator license type required.

Get the current status of an acceptance check.

Permissions
----------
Read permissions required

item.name: Create Check LO of XSDG Auto Acceptance Check Pass
PATCH Check LO to DG Shipment
Step4. All Shipment Acceptance Check > PASS
Tracking CargoIQ Milestone for Frontend Web

request.description:
Get the current status of an acceptance check.

Permissions
----------
Read permissions required

Get the current status of an acceptance check.

Permissions

Read permissions required
